verses.text: Tu-in tua lai-ah Benjamin mi, Bikhri' tapa Sheba min nei, mi ginalo khat hong omkha hi. Amah in peengkul tumin, “David' sungah tanh i nei kei a, Jessi' tapa' sungah gamh i nei kei hi; na inn ciat uhah ciah un, Israel-te aw,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi khempeuh David' kiang pan nungkik uh a, Bikhri' tapa Sheba zui uh hi. Ahih hangin Judah mite in Jordan panin Jerusalem ciangdong a kumpipa uh kiptakin zui uh hi

Tua ciangin Jerusalem-a a inn-ah David tung hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in inn kem dingin a nusiat a zineu sawmte la-in a kivil inn khat sungah amaute koihin amaute a vak hi. Ahih hangin amaute luppihlo hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute a khang laipi-in meigong numei suak uh a, a sih dong uh amaute kikhumcip hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Amasa kiangah, “Ni thum sungin Judah mite kei kiangah khawm in la, nangmahmah zong hih lai-ah hong om in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Judah-te a sam dingin Amasa pai a, ahi zongin ama tungah a kiciam a kisehsa khengin amah zekai hi

Tua ciangin David in Abishai kiangah, “Tu-in Bikhri' tapa Sheba in Absalom sangin eite tungah siatna tamzaw hong bawl ding hi. Na topa' nasemte la in la, amah delh in. Tua hi kei leh amah in ama-a' dingin khuapi muan'huaite ngahin eite tungah buaina hong piangsak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Abishai' nungah Joab leh Khereth mite leh Peleth mite, leh mi thahat khempeuh pai uh hi. Bikhri' tapa Sheba a delh dingin Jerusalem panin amaute kuankhia uh hi

Gibeon gamsunga suangtumpi-ah amaute a tun' uh ciangin amaute a dawn dingin Amasa hong pai hi. Tu-in Joab in galkap puan silhin, tua tungah, a kawng tungah a kigak a paai sunga namsau tawh a kithuah kawnggak khat om a, a mailam manawhin a pai laitakin a namsau seel hi
Tua ciangin Joab in Amasa kiangah, “Ka sanggampa aw, bangcici na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Joab in amah a hopih kawmin a taklam khut tawh a khamul-in Amasa man hi

Ahih hangin Amasa in Joab' khutsunga om namsau mulo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Joab in a namsau tawh a pumpi sat a, nihvei sat kulloin a gilpi leilakah buakhia hi; tua ciangin Amasa a si hi. Tua ciangin Joab leh a sanggampa Abishai in Bikhri' tapa Sheba delhuh hi
Tua ciangin Joab' mite khat Amasa' kiangah dingin, “Joab a gum peuhmah, leh David-a' ahi mi peuhmah in Joab zui un,” a ci hi

Lam lianpi-a ama sisan sungah Amasa kidiahin a om hi. Tua lai-ah a pai mi peuhmah in amah a muh ciangin a khawl uh hi. Mi khempeuh a khawlna tua mipa in a muh ciangin amah in lam lianpi panin gamlakah Amasa puakhia-in ama tungah puan khat a khuh hi
Lam lianpi panin amah a kilakkhiat khit ciangin Bikhri' tapa Sheba a delh dingin Joab nungah mi khempeuh paisuak hi
Tua ciangin Israel minamte khempeuh nawkin Abelbethmaakah khua-ah Sheba pai hi. Bikhri mi khempeuh kikhawm uh a, amah zui-in khuapi sungah tum uh hi

Tua ciangin Joab tawh a om mi khempeuh hong pai-in Abelbethmaakah khua-ah amah umcih uh hi. Amaute in khuapi simna-in suang cianpi khat bawl uh a, kulhpi langkhatah ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kulhpi a puk theihna dingin amaute in kulhpi nuai to uh hi
Tua ciangin numei pil khat in khuapi panin samin, “Za un! Joab kiangah gen un: ‘Nang tungah thu kong gen theihna dingin hih lai-ah hong pai in,’ ci un,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin tuanu' mai-ah Joab hong pai hi. Tua numei in, “Nang, Joab na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Ka hi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua numei in ama kiangah, “Na nasemnu' thugente ngai in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Ka ngai hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Tanglai-in amaute in, ‘Abel-ah thu dong sak un,’ ci thei uh a, tua bangin amaute in thu siangsak uh hi

Kei pen Israel sungah tua bangin kilemna a deih a thuman mi khat ka hi hi. Nang in Israel sungah nu tawh a kibang khuapi khat suksiat ding na hanciam hi. Bang hangin Topa' gamhluah valhtum ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Joab in dawngin, “Keimah in ka valhtum ding ahi a, ka suksiat ding ahi zongin keima ngaihsut hi deklo hi

Tua thu manlo hi. Ahih hangin Efraim mualtung gammi Bikhri' tapa Sheba a kici mipa in Kumpi David lehdo hi; amah bek hong pia in. Tua hi leh khuapi panin ka nungkik ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua numei in Joab kiangah, “En in, kulhsung panin nang kiangah ama lutang hong kilawnsuk ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin ama pilna zangin mi khempeuh kiangah tua numei a pai hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Bikhri' tapa Sheba' lu tankhia-in Joab kiangah lawnkhia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in peengkul tum a, khuapi panin amaute kikhenin a milipin a inn ciat uhah a ciah uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa kiang Jerusalem-ah Joab a ciah hi.
Tua laitakin Joab pen Israel galkap khempeuh a uk ahi hi. Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah pen Khereth mite leh Peleth mite a uk ahi hi
Adoram pen aana tawh na a kisemsakte a uk ahi hi. Ahilud' tapa Jehoshafat pen thu ciamtehpa ahi hi
Sheva pen lai-atpa ahi hi. Zadok leh Abiathar siampite ahi uh hi
Jair mi Ira zong David' siampi ahi hi.
